body_txt: He may be the Funny Animal , the Intellectual Animal , or maybe even the Speech-Impaired Animal , but if there's one thing that he's incredibly good at, it's solving any kind of mystery that comes his way. He can be either a Hardboiled Detective , an Inspector Oblivious , or a Defective Detective . Whether he does it on his own, or with a friend, or with a group of humans, expect him to help solve the case with ease. This character may or may not work in a World of Funny Animals . Very often, these characters are dogs of some description . Compare Animal Superheroes .
